title: RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_CAP_REACHED — A budget envelope has reached its cap
description: Domain-event-DDD payload published by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET when an envelope's consumed_amount reaches or exceeds its cap_amount, or when CMD.RECALIBRATE_PERIOD_BUDGET clamps a cap to or below the current consumed amount. Atomic with the triggering RVT.CONSUMPTION_RECORDED (see INV.ENV.004). NORMAL signal of consumption — NOT a relapse signal.

cap_amount.description: Cap of the envelope at the time of depletion (post-recalibration value if applicable).

consumed_amount.description: Total consumed_amount at the moment of cap-reached. Equal to or greater than cap_amount.

trigger_kind.description: What caused the cap-reached transition: a consumption that crossed the cap, or a tier-upgrade recalibration that clamped the cap to or below the already-consumed amount.

causation_event_id.description: Identifier of the upstream resource event that caused this transition.
